name_en: Fushiguro River-Landing Storehouse
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as a building. It is municipally designated by Date City, located in the Fushiguro district.

name_en: Chōkokuji Temple Gate
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as a building, a temple gate. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Hobara-machi Gochōme.

name_en: Main Hall of Hachiman Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as a building, a shrine main hall. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Yanagawa-machi Yawata.

description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as a building, a two-storied temple gate. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Yanagawa-machi Aza Uchimachi.

name_en: Ryūhōji Temple Gate
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as a building, a temple gate. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Yanagawa-machi Yawata.

name_en: Ryūhōji Temple Bell Tower
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as a building, a temple bell tower. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Yanagawa-machi Yawata.

description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as a building, a temple gate. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Ryōzen-machi Kakeda.

name_romaji: Kenpon Chakushoku Kōdaiji Butsu Nehanzu Tsuketari Shaka Shussanzu oyobi Kankei Monjo

description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as painting, a color-on-silk nirvana image with an accompanying painting and related documents. It is municipally designated by Date City, located in the Fushiguro district.

description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as painting, an image of Fudō Myōō (Acala). It is municipally designated by Date City, located in the Hakozaki district.

name_en: Womb and Diamond Realm Mandalas of Fukugonji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as painting, a pair of mandalas of the two realms. It is municipally designated by Date City, located in the Hakozaki district.

name_en: Illustrated Lotus Sutra of Kōdaiji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as painting, an illustrated exposition of the Lotus Sutra. It is municipally designated by Date City, located in the Fushiguro district.

name_en: Dedicated Framed Votive Tablet of Atsuta Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as painting, a dedicated framed votive tablet (ema). It is municipally designated by Date City, located in the Hiromae district.

name_en: Dedicated Framed Votive Tablet of Yakumo Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as painting, a dedicated framed votive tablet (ema). It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Aza Katamachi.

name_en: Dedicated Framed Votive Tablet of Suiun Shrine
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as painting, a dedicated framed votive tablet (ema). It is municipally designated by Date City, located in the Fushiguro district.

description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as painting. It is municipally designated by Date City, located in the Hakozaki district.

name_en: Painting of the Manninkō Assembly at Taira Kannon Hall, Kōdaiji Temple
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as painting. It is municipally designated by Date City, located in the Fushiguro district.

description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as painting, a stone painting stele jointly produced by Kumasaka Tekizan and Ransai. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Hobara-machi Aza Higashidaigo.

name_romaji: Kumasaka Tekizan・Ransai Gassaku Gahi Baichiku Gahi
name_en: Plum-and-Bamboo Painting Stele by Kumasaka Tekizan and Ransai
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as painting, a stone painting stele of plum and bamboo jointly produced by Kumasaka Tekizan and Ransai. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Hobara-machi Gochōme.

name_en: Plum-and-Moon Painting Stele by Kumasaka Tekizan and Ransai

description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as painting, depicting silkworm raising in Date. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Yanagawa-machi Aza Furumachi.

name_en: Votive Tablet: Wild Horses

name_en: Votive Tablet: Silk Reeling
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as painting, a votive tablet (ema) depicting silk reeling. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Yanagawa-machi Isazawa.

name_romaji: Yakushi Nyorai Zazō・Jūni Shinshō Ryūzō hoka
name_en: Seated Yakushi Buddha, Standing Twelve Heavenly Generals, and Others
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, comprising a seated image of Yakushi (Bhaiṣajyaguru) Buddha, standing images of the Twelve Heavenly Generals, and others. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Hobara-machi Aza Jōnouchi.

name_en: Image of the Eleven-Headed Kannon Bodhisattva
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, an image of the eleven-headed Kannon (Avalokiteśvara). It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Yanagawa-machi Yawata.

name_romaji: Mokuzō Jizō Bosatsu Zazō Tsuketari Kūden

description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, a wooden seated image of the Jizō (Kṣitigarbha) Bodhisattva with an accompanying miniature shrine. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Yanagawa-machi Awano.

description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, a wooden seated image of the Shō-Kannon (Ārya-Avalokiteśvara). It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Yanagawa-machi Aza Furumachi.

description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, a stone lantern dedicated by Kakizaki Hirotoshi (Hakyō). It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Yanagawa-machi Aza Kamimachi.

description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, a wooden standing image of Yakushi (Bhaiṣajyaguru) Buddha. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Yanagawa-machi Shirone.

name_en: Wooden Standing Amida Buddha
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, a wooden standing image of Amida (Amitābha) Buddha. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Yanagawa-machi Awano.

description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, a wooden standing image of Bishamonten (Vaiśravaṇa) enshrined in a miniature shrine. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Yanagawa-machi Aza Ushiromachi.

name_en: Thirty-Three Kannon of Oniishi Kannon Hall
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, a set of thirty-three Kannon images. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Yanagawa-machi Yawata.

name_en: Sugiuchi Images of the Sixteen Arhats
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, a set of images of the Sixteen Arhats. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Tsukidate-machi Nukada.

name_en: Shimokamiyama Cliff-Carved Buddha
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, a Buddha image carved into a cliff face. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Tsukidate-machi Nunokawa.

name_en: Image of Yakushi Buddha
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, an image of Yakushi (Bhaiṣajyaguru) Buddha. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Tsukidate-machi Nukada.

name_en: Standing Image of Benzaiten
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, a standing image of Benzaiten (Sarasvatī). It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Tsukidate-machi Miyoda.

name_en: Image of Nyoirin Kannon
description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, an image of the Nyoirin Kannon. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Tsukidate-machi Nunokawa.

description_en: A tangible cultural property classified as sculpture, an image of the Jizō (Kṣitigarbha) Bodhisattva. It is municipally designated by Date City, located at Tsukidate-machi Nukada.
